name: Seafood Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the onion in butter until transparent.
2. Add thyme and celery salt. Remove from heat.
3. In a saucepan, pour whipping cream over fish fillets.
4. Cover, bring to boil, and simmer slowly for 10 minutes or until fish flakes easily.
5. Remove fish with slotted spoon; break into small pieces and remove bones.
6. Add onion mixture and scallops to poaching liquid. Bring to barely a boil, then simmer for about 1 minute or until scallops are opaque.
7. If not serving immediately, refrigerate everything at this stage.
8. Just before serving, add fish, lobster, sour cream, potatoes, and milk. Heat through without boiling.
9. Season with salt and pepper.
10. Ladle into soup bowls and sprinkle with paprika.
11. Serve (4-6 servings).
